titleStmt.title: SII 17.247: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 247. (A.R. No. 225 of 1904.) ŚIṄGAVARAM, GINGEE TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the east base of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Raṅganātha temple.
This inscription commences with the praśasti, [Pugaḻ]mādu viḷaṅga, etc., of Kulōttuṅga I.

It records the gift of 32 milch cows for a perpetual lamp to god Tiruppaṉṟikkuṉṟāḻvār by••• ra[pi]chchaṉ Vaikundaṉ alias Jayaśiṅga-kulakāla-periyār, a resident of Arumbūr in Vikramaśōḻa-vaḷanāḍu in Jayaṅgoṇḍaśōḻa-maṇḍalam. It mentions Kāśyapaṉ Ś[r]ī Rāman of Vaikh[ā]nasa-sūtra, who was performing worship in the temple of the Āḻvār.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pukaḻ mātu viḷaṅka jayamātu virumpa nilamakaḷ nilava malar makaḷ puṇara Urimaiyil ciṟan=ta maṇimuṭi cūṭi villavar kulaitara
mīṉavar nilaikeṭa Eṉai maṉṉavar Iḻitaluṟ ṟalamara tikkaṉaittun tan cakkaram naṭātti vijayaābhiṣekam paṇṇi vīrasiṁhāsanattu puvanamuḻutuṭai
yāḷoṭum viṟṟirun=taruḷiya korājakesaripanmarāṉa tribhuvaṉacakravattikaḷ śrīkulot tuṅkacoḻadevaṟku yāṇṭu 3 10Āvatu ja
yaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu vi[ kkrama] coḻavaḷanāṭṭu Arumpūr Irukkum rapic caṉ vaikun=taṉāṉa jayaciṅkakulakāla periyār
tiruppaṉṟikkuṉṟāḻvaārkku vaitta tirunun=tāviḷakku Oṉṟu Oṉṟukku viṭṭa cāvā muvā perum pacu 3 10 2 Imuppattiraṇṭum kaik
koṇṭu can=tirāticcava� tāka kaikkoṇṭom Ivāḻ(vāḻ)vāṉai tiruvārākaṉai paṇṇum vaikhaānasa sū
ttrattu kāśyapan cirāman ciṅkapirāṉ kṛṣṇa nampimādevan ciṅkapirānu vāmanan muḷḷiṭṭom ..
Digital edition of SII 17.247 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
